init.title: Configure Zoned Heating settings
init.description: Choose device which controls the boiler

controller_restoration_setting.title: Configure Zoned Heating settings
controller_restoration_setting.description: Use fixed settings for restoring controller after override mode, instead of storing controller settings prior to starting override mode. Recommended when TRVs are present in the same room as the controller thermostat.

data.use_fixed_controller_restoration_setting: Use fixed controller restoration mode + temperature (recommended with TRVs in controller room)

fixed_controller_restoration_setting.title: Configure Zoned Heating settings
fixed_controller_restoration_setting.description: Choose the controller mode and setpoint that zoned heating will restore after override mode ends.

zones.title: Configure Zoned Heating settings
zones.description: Choose devices which control the zones

max_setpoint.title: Configure Zoned Heating settings
max_setpoint.description: Limit the maximum setpoint which can be requested by the zones

controller_delay_time.title: Configure Zoned Heating settings
controller_delay_time.description: Time it takes for controller entity to reflect changes in setpoint
